overdueItems.description: Document upload/download handlers unwired on Lead, Contact, Deal detail pages. Backend storage infrastructure exists but entity detail buttons have no onClick handlers.
overdueItems.remediation_plan: IFC-216

overdueItems.description: EmailCompose not wired into entity detail Compose buttons. Email adapter layer built but Lead/Contact detail Compose buttons are no-ops.
overdueItems.remediation_plan: IFC-217

overdueItems.description: Email list on entity detail pages derived from activities, not real Gmail/Outlook adapter. Connectors exist but not integrated into detail page email tabs.
overdueItems.remediation_plan: IFC-221

overdueItems.description: No Similar Leads/Contacts API using pgvector embeddings. RAG infrastructure exists but no entity similarity query endpoint.
overdueItems.remediation_plan: IFC-218

overdueItems.description: EmailCompose component built as standalone page but not integrated into entity detail page Compose buttons.
overdueItems.remediation_plan: IFC-217

overdueItems.description: No Run AI Analysis button or fallback indicator when aiInsight is null on Contact detail. Lead fixed 2026-03-04. Silent fallback to defaults without visual indication.
overdueItems.remediation_plan: IFC-220

overdueItems.description: Activity reactions/comments arrays always []; action buttons (Reply, React, Add Note, Share) are no-ops on Lead and Contact detail pages. Schema additions needed.
overdueItems.remediation_plan: IFC-219

overdueItems.description: 9 dead analytics router endpoints: exportConversionFunnel, exportMetrics, exportReport, getConversionFunnel, getLeadMetrics, getOverview, getSalesMetrics, getTimeSeriesData, leadStats. Backend built (ANALYTICS-001), zero web callers. IFC-037 (analytics dashboard UI) is Backlog sprint 21 but does not wire these procedures.
overdueItems.remediation_plan: IFC-288

overdueItems.description: 17 dead agent/conversation router endpoints (13 conversation.* + 4 agent.*). All 13 conversation endpoints have zero production callers — frontend uses autoResponse.* (IFC-029), aiReview.* (IFC-180/181), and aiMonitoring.* (IFC-197) which query the same DB tables (conversationRecord, messageRecord, toolCallRecord) directly. Dead conversation endpoints: create, getById, getBySessionId, search, addMessage, recordToolCall, updateToolCall, approveToolCall, endConversation, escalate, getPendingApprovals, getAnalytics, archiveOld. Dead agent endpoints: executeTool, getPendingCount, getTool, listTools. Only consumers are k6 load test (conversation.search, conversation.getPendingApprovals) — no production traffic.
overdueItems.remediation_plan: IFC-289: wire all 17 endpoints to frontend consumers (chat panel, agent-approvals, AI Search, admin dashboard) and refactor aiMonitoring to delegate to conversation router instead of duplicating DB queries

overdueItems.description: 5 dead integrations router endpoints: getAllConnectorsHealth, getConnectorHealth, getConnectorsByType, getDashboardConfig, triggerSync. Backend built (IFC-003), zero web callers — no integrations dashboard UI planned.
overdueItems.remediation_plan: IFC-290

overdueItems.description: 5 dead feedback router endpoints: checkRetraining, exportTrainingData, getForLead, submitCorrection, submitSimple. Backend built (IFC-068), zero web callers — no feedback submission or correction UI exists.
overdueItems.remediation_plan: IFC-291

overdueItems.description: 6 dead legal router endpoints: appointments.findNextSlot, documents.grantAccess, documents.placeLegalHold, documents.releaseLegalHold, documents.revokeAccess, documents.submitForReview. Backend built (IFC-137, IFC-140, IFC-152), zero web callers — no legal ACL UI, scheduling wizard, or review workflow UI.
overdueItems.remediation_plan: IFC-292

overdueItems.description: 3 dead security/audit router endpoints: audit.getByResource, audit.getMyActivity, audit.getSecurityEvents. Backend built (IFC-098, IFC-072, IFC-046), zero web callers — no admin security events page or profile activity section.
overdueItems.remediation_plan: IFC-293

overdueItems.description: 3 dead notifications router endpoints: batchAction, getPreferences, updatePreferences. Backend built (IFC-157), zero web callers — no notification preferences settings page or batch action UI.
overdueItems.remediation_plan: IFC-293

overdueItems.description: 3 dead experiment router endpoints: assignVariant, recordConversion, recordScore. Backend A/B framework built (IFC-025), zero web callers — no experiment tracking code or runner calls these procedures.
overdueItems.remediation_plan: IFC-294

overdueItems.description: 3 dead intelligence router endpoints: getInsightsSummary, triggerPrediction, updateContactInsights. Backend AI scoring built (IFC-095), zero web callers — no insights summary dashboard or prediction trigger UI.
overdueItems.remediation_plan: IFC-294

overdueItems.description: 1 dead ai-monitoring router endpoint: getHallucinationReport. Backend built (IFC-117), zero web callers — no hallucination report dashboard section.
overdueItems.remediation_plan: IFC-294

overdueItems.description: 3 dead billing router endpoints: ensureCustomer, getUsageMetrics, updateBillingInformation. Backend built (IFC-099, IFC-107), zero web callers — no checkout flow, usage metrics page, or billing settings page wires these.
overdueItems.remediation_plan: IFC-295

overdueItems.description: 1 dead auth router endpoint: getSessions. Backend built (IFC-006), zero web callers — no session list/management UI in security settings.
overdueItems.remediation_plan: IFC-295

overdueItems.description: 2 dead subscription router endpoints: getPlans, toggleModule. Backend built (IFC-014, IFC-016), zero web callers — pricing/upgrade UI uses Stripe portal directly, no module toggle settings page.
overdueItems.remediation_plan: IFC-295

overdueItems.description: 1 dead autoresponse router endpoint: submitForApproval. Backend built (IFC-028, IFC-029), zero web callers — no approval submission UI or workflow trigger.
overdueItems.remediation_plan: IFC-295

overdueItems.description: 1 dead admin router endpoint: queues.getByName. Zero web callers, zero API internal callers, zero tests. Needs queue inspector or admin tools UI.
overdueItems.remediation_plan: IFC-295

overdueItems.description: 3 dead task router endpoints (task.stats, task.assign, task.reschedule) at lines ~695/~751/~814 in task.router.ts — zero frontend callers.
overdueItems.remediation_plan: Remove or wire during router cleanup sprint

overdueItems.description: Task entity missing Account linking — requires DB migration (add accountId to Task model) + 6-layer change (Prisma, Domain, Application, Validators, API, Frontend). RelatedTasksCard has graceful empty state for account type.
overdueItems.remediation_plan: Create IFC-* task for Sprint Continuous

overdueItems.description: No optimistic locking on Task (or any entity) — concurrent edits silently overwrite. Requires schema migration (version field), domain change, application layer, and API layer updates. System-wide architectural decision needed.
overdueItems.remediation_plan: ADR needed for system-wide optimistic locking strategy

shortTerm.description: KPI not met: traceability coverage >=90% (target: >= 90%, actual: 83.36%)
